rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Place assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations in component type annexes
Place assignments in component implementation annexes when valid
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
generic_rules: Use exact current-case names from the model index
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Delete generated clauses if diagnostics report unresolved references to AADL properties
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions may only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
Use `eq` for equations, `const` for constants, and `assign` for assignments
anti_patterns: Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent ports/components
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions without explicit exposure
irrelevant_topics: Annex placement for assumptions and guarantees
